name: Other Financial Intermediaries
description_short: Balance sheet statistics for other financial intermediaries (OFIs) in the euro area, covering entities like financial holding companies, securities dealers, and other entities not classified elsewhere in the financial sector.
use_cases: How large is the euro area shadow banking sector?
What types of assets do OFIs hold?
How have OFI balance sheets grown relative to the banking sector?
What is the cross-border exposure of euro area OFIs?
